title: Blepharitis
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Blepharitis is inflammation of the eyelids where the eyelashes grow.
Symptoms include inflamed, irritated, itchy, and reddened eyelids with dandruff-like debris at the eyelash base.
Cleaning the eyelids and warm compresses are common home-care measures.
Eye pain, vision change, worsening swelling, or concern for deeper infection needs clinician care.
